MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-15-654069 WITH CASE CUD-15-654068
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Off Calendar

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Francisco Torres, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Witness Robert Crosby sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant David Torres.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at: 373 Ellis Street, #508, City and County of San Francisco, California 94102.

Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $703.92
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $315.00
for a Total Judgment of $1018.92

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Ora Prochovnick; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Robert Crosby.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant David Torres did NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of JAN-11-2016 remains on calendar. (JPT/501)
